name: Convoy
description: Library component. The convoy bead -- tracks the overall convoy lifecycle from Staged through Landed (or ForceLandPending -> LandedForce). The AllDone guard is the load-bearing cross-instance observation: convoy auto-closes only when ALL issues are Closed, ALL MRs are Merged, and ALL polecats are Idle. The convoy has 6 observe ports for a 2-issue configuration; N-issue generalization requires more ports (or a Kinner language feature for parameterized observe-port counts).

LAND.description: receives Land or ForceLand from Mayor. Tagged 'Land' or 'ForceLand'.

CONVOY_DONE.description: sends ConvoyDone to Mayor when all work is complete. Tagged 'ConvoyDone'.

ISS1_OBSERVE.description: observes issue 1 for the AllDone guard.

ISS2_OBSERVE.description: observes issue 2 for the AllDone guard.

MR1_OBSERVE.description: observes MR 1 for the AllDone guard.

MR2_OBSERVE.description: observes MR 2 for the AllDone guard.

POL1_OBSERVE.description: observes polecat 1 for the AllDone guard.

POL2_OBSERVE.description: observes polecat 2 for the AllDone guard.

LANDING_OBSERVE.description: observes Landing completion. Gates both Closed->Landed and ForceLandPending->LandedForce.

actors.name: Convoy
actors.owner: Convoy bead lifecycle. Staged -> Open -> AllDone -> Closed -> Landed (normal). Open -> ForceLandPending -> LandedForce (force). Both landing paths gate on Landing = Done.

triples.event: all-done: all issues closed, MRs merged, polecats idle
triples.guard: iss1State = ISS1_OBSERVE_Closed /\ iss2State = ISS2_OBSERVE_Closed /\ mr1State = MR1_OBSERVE_Merged /\ mr2State = MR2_OBSERVE_Merged /\ pol1State = POL1_OBSERVE_Idle /\ pol2State = POL2_OBSERVE_Idle

triples.event: ForceLand received: convoy enters pending (cleanup first)
